code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut seen = "\n"
mut count = 0
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      let key = "\n#{current}\n"
      if not string.contains(seen, key)
        seen = "#{seen}#{current}\n"
        count = count + 1
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(current)
  let key = "\n#{current}\n"
  if not string.contains(seen, key)
    count = count + 1
  end
end
println("unique=#{count}")
